name: resourceAllocation
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.allocations === undefined || output.result.allocations.every(a => Number.isFinite(a.resourcesNeeded) && Number.isFinite(a.resourcesAssigned))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Greedy priority-ordered allocation (critical→low) of the available resource pool against each mission's resourcesNeeded. Fail-closed: resourcesNeeded goes through finiteNum (clamped 1..100000) so an Infinity can't drain availableAfter to -Infinity; non-array inputs default to []; non-object missions filtered. Empty resources → honest CTA message. Result renders totalResources/totalMissions/availableAfter/allocations[]/fullyStaffed/understaffed.
